mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_community_post set Post_View_Count = Post_View_Count + 1 WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TBL_COMMUNITY_POST.nextval FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_COMMUNITY_POST (post_no, User_No, post_title, post_content, post_date, post_view_count, user_nickname) VALUES(#{postNo}, #{userNo}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, sysdate, 0, #{userNickname})
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COMMUNITY_POST SET Post_Title = #{postTitle}, POST_CONTENT = #{postContent}, USER_NICKNAME= #{userNickname}, POST_DATE = sysdate WHERE POST_NO = #{postNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMMUNITY_COMMENT (COMMENT_NO, USER_NO, POST_NO, USER_NICKNAME, COMMENT_CONTENT, POST_DATE) VALUES(SEQ_TBL_COMMUNITY_COMMENT.nextval, #{userNo}, #{postNo}, #{userNickname}, #{commentContent}, sysdate)
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT tcp.post_no, tcp.user_no, tcp.post_title, tcp.user_nickname, tcp.post_date, (SELECT COUNT(post_like_no) FROM tbl_post_like tpl WHERE tpl.post_no = tcp.post_no) AS like_count FROM tbl_community_post tcp
tcp.post_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
tcp.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY tcp.post_date DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT tcp.post_no,tcp.user_no, tcp.post_title, tcp.user_nickname, tcp.post_date, tcp.post_content, tcp.post_view_count, (select count(post_like_no) from tbl_post_like tpl where tpl.post_no = tcp.post_no) as like_count, tpi.Post_Img_System_Name, tpi.Post_Img_Origin_Name FROM tbl_community_post tcp LEFT JOIN tbl_post_image tpi on tpi.post_no = tcp.post_no where tcp.post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POST_LIKE (Post_Like_No, Post_No, User_No) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_POST_LIKE.nextval, #{postNo}, #{userNo})
mapper.select:
SELEDCT post_no, post_Title, user_nickname, post_date FROM tbl_community_post
post_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY post_date DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, A.* FROM ( SELECT tcp.post_no AS post_no, tcp.post_title AS post_title, tcp.user_nickname AS user_nickname FROM TBL_COMMUNITY_POST tcp WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tbl_post_image tpi WHERE tpi.post_no = tcp.post_no ) ORDER BY tcp.post_date DESC ) A ) WHERE rn <= 3
